diff_summary: 1 line changed in commands/clean.md (line 589). Replaces 'If satisfied: Changes already committed' with 'If satisfied: Changes already committed — to publish to remote: run `/commit` (to register the commit and write the push token), then `/push`'.

advisory_preexisting.note: Pre-existing findings from full-repo scanner runs. All tagged introduced_in_diff: false. Non-blocking per default-safe rule (AC-2.6(b)). Surfaced for awareness only.

orphaned_subagents_advisory.reason: detect-orphan-agents.sh reports not referenced by any command (narrow pattern match). Codex analysis shows this is a false positive: product-owner is referenced by /dev and /dev-overnight specialist routing as a bare specialist name in command files.

unreferenced_scripts_advisory.reason: detect-orphan-scripts.sh reports no references. Codex analysis shows false positive: this is a hook-injected todo script for /dev-overnight command (commands/dev-overnight.md exists). The hook-todo-injection.py system dynamically loads scripts/todo/<command>.py for matching slash commands.
detect-orphan-scripts.sh reports no references. False positive: hook-injected todo script for /dev-command (commands/dev-command.md exists).
detect-orphan-scripts.sh reports no references. False positive: hook-injected todo script for /redev (commands/redev.md exists).
detect-orphan-scripts.sh reports no references. False positive: hook-injected todo script for /site-navigate (commands/site-navigate.md exists).
detect-orphan-scripts.sh reports no references. False positive: hook-injected todo script for /security-check (commands/security-check.md exists).

summary.diff_verdict: CLEAN — no cleanliness violations introduced by this diff

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified 5 issues: (1) scope drift — all draft findings are pre-existing and should not appear in diff-scoped summary; (2) product-owner false positive — referenced by specialist routing; (3) scripts/todo/*.py false positives — hook injection system loads them dynamically when matching command files exist; (4) severity inconsistency in draft (moot after removals); (5) summary required correction to zero.

findings.issue: Scope drift: all 6 draft findings are introduced_in_diff: false and unrelated to the single-line change.
findings.proposed_fix: Remove from primary findings, move to advisory_preexisting, set summary.total_issues = 0.
findings.rationale: Correct per default-safe rule: pre-existing findings must not appear in diff-scoped summary totals.

findings.issue: False positive: agents/product-owner.md is not orphaned; referenced by /dev and /dev-overnight specialist routing.
findings.rationale: Verified: product-owner appears 20+ times across commands/dev.md, commands/dev-overnight.md, agents/pm.md as a specialist name. The detect-orphan-agents.sh uses narrow pattern matching that misses bare specialist-name references. Moved to advisory with false_positive_removed label.

findings.issue: False positives and unsafe deletion risk: scripts/todo/*.py files are command-named todo scripts dynamically loaded by hook-todo-injection.py.
findings.rationale: Verified by Codex shell check: all flagged scripts have matching commands/<command>.md files. hook-todo-injection.py loads scripts/todo/<cmd>.py for any SlashCommand invocation. Deleting these would break /dev-overnight, /dev-command, /redev, /site-navigate, /security-check todo injection. Safety Rule violation would occur. Moved to advisory.

findings.issue: Severity inconsistency: draft marks some entries minor when rules say major for orphaned subagents/scripts.
findings.proposed_fix: Prefer removal as false positives; for future true positives use consistent major severity.
findings.rationale: Moot after removals. Noted for future detector improvement: detect-orphan-scripts.sh should treat scripts/todo/<cmd>.py as referenced when commands/<cmd>.md exists.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 5 blocker/major findings applied: pre-existing findings moved to advisory_preexisting, all false positives removed from primary findings, summary corrected to zero. The diff introduces no cleanliness violations.
